zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanne Alice Webb於1459年出生在英國肯特福利頓登時，她的父親John Gavin Webb29歲，母親Johanne White27歲。她於1478年與Stephen Guillaume Payne在英國肯特福利頓登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年在她的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國肯特福利頓登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanne Alice Webb于1459年出生在英国肯特福利頓登时，她的父亲John Gavin Webb29岁，母亲Johanne White27岁。她于1478年与Stephen Guillaume Payne在英国肯特福利頓登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年在她的家乡享年36岁，埋葬在英国肯特福利頓登。

nameMeanings.name: Webb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

variants.name: Webster
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webbester ‘weaver’ (Old English webbestre ‘female weaver’). By the time of surname formation, the gender distinction of the -stre suffix had almost completely disappeared. Compare Webb , Webber , and Weaver .

History: The name Webster was brought to North America from England independently by several different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One John Webster settled in Ipswich, MA, in 1635; another John Webster (died 1661), ancestor of the lexicographer Noah Webster, emigrated to Cambridge, MA, c. 1631 and later became one of the founders of the colony of CT, of which he was appointed governor in 1656. Daniel Webster (1782–1852), politician and orator, was born in Salisbury, NH, a descendant of Thomas Webster, a prominent 17th-century citizen of Ipswich, MA, whose family had settled there around 1635, while he was still a child.

variants.name: Webber
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanne Alice Webb was born in 1459, in Frittenden, Kent, England, her father, John Gavin Webb, was 29 and her mother, Johanne White, was 27. She married Stephen Guillaume Payne in 1478, in Frittenden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1495, in her hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in Frittenden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanne Alice Webb est née en 1459, à Frittenden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Gavin Webb, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Johanne White, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen Guillaume Payne en 1478, à Frittenden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1495, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Frittenden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanne Alice Webb 1459 in Frittenden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gavin Webb 29 und ihre Mutter Johanne White 27. Sie hat 1478 in Frittenden, Kent, England Stephen Guillaume Payne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1495 im Alter von 36 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Frittenden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne Alice Webb è nata il nel 1459 nel Frittenden, Kent, England, sua padre, John Gavin Webb, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Johanne White, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Stephen Guillaume Payne nel 1478, nel Frittenden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1495, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Frittenden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanne Alice Webbが1459年にイギリスケントフリッテンデンで生まれた時，父John Gavin Webbは29歳，母Johanne Whiteは27歳であった。1478年にイギリスケントフリッテンデンでStephen Guillaume Payneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年に故郷で36歳で死去し，イギリスケントフリッテンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanne Alice Webb(이)가 1459년 영국 켄트 프리텐든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gavin Webb(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanne White(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1478년 영국 켄트 프리텐든에서 Stephen Guillaume Payne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 그녀의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 프리텐든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne Alice Webb nasceu em 1459, em Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gavin Webb, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Johanne White, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen Guillaume Payne em 1478, em Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1495, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanne Alice Webb родилась в 1459 г. в местности фриттенден, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Gavin Webb было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanne White, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Guillaume Payne в 1478 г. в местности фриттенден, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1495 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности фриттенден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanne Alice Webb nació en 1459, en Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gavin Webb, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Johanne White, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Stephen Guillaume Payne en 1478, en Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1495, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Frittenden, Kent, Inglaterra.
